C

ConfigData - Klasse in de.sbg.unity.configmanager
 
ConfigData(String) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.sbg.unity.configmanager.ConfigData
Create a new ConfigManager (Default) (Output: Config.properties)
ConfigData(String, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.sbg.unity.configmanager.ConfigData
Create new ConfigManager with own name (Example: Config.properties)
ConfigData(String, String, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.sbg.unity.configmanager.ConfigData
Create new ConfigManager with own name and extention (Example: Config.config)
ConfigManager - Klasse in de.sbg.unity.configmanager
 
ConfigManager() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.sbg.unity.configmanager.ConfigManager
 
CreateConfig() - Methode in Klasse de.sbg.unity.configmanager.ConfigData
Create a new properties file.
